1712170.name: Fear Simulator VR
1712170.description: Face your fears like never before in this ultra-realistic VR simulator. Step into a lifelike elevator, carefully aligned with your real-world space using mixed reality, and prepare for a journey straight to the top. When the doors open, you’ll be confronted with a narrow plank suspended high above the ground. Every step is filmed in immersive 360° video, capturing breathtaking views and a terrifying sense of depth that will test even the bravest. Feel your heart race as you look down, balance carefully, and push yourself to reach the other side. Perfect for parties, challenges with friends, or personal fear training, this experience blends VR and reality to deliver maximum immersion. Will you conquer the plank… or freeze in fear?
1712170.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
